attributes.class: login-class ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-valid ion-untouched ion-pristine ion-valid sc-ion-input-md-h sc-ion-input-md-s md input-label-placement-start in-item hydrated
ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures core authentication inputs and the sign-in action but contains duplicate password representations, unstable autogenerated locators, noisy layout content, and missing workflow-critical navigation and validation elements.

issues.message: Two separate password elements represent the same functional control, creating ambiguity for downstream resource generation.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the most stable and semantically meaningful password field representation.

issues.message: Locator id=ion-input-0 appears autogenerated and brittle across sessions or builds.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a stable placeholder- or attribute-based locator such as xpath=//input[@placeholder='User Name'].

issues.message: Locator id=ion-input-1 appears autogenerated and brittle across sessions or builds.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a stable locator such as xpath=//input[@placeholder='Password'] or xpath=//ion-input[@id='password'].

issues.message: Element name is overly generic and inconsistent with other form field naming conventions.
The ion-input wrapper is classified as textbox even though it semantically represents a password control.
issues.suggested_fix: Classify the retained password element as password.

issues.message: Locator relies on visible text SIGN IN while the component also exposes text='Login', creating potential mismatch and brittleness.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a more stable locator such as //ion-button[@text='Login'].

issues.message: Background layout container is non-actionable and unsuitable for downstream automation modeling.
Forgot Password navigation control required by the workflow is missing from the approved element set.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a forgot_password_link element with a stable locator.

issues.message: Back Button referenced in the workflow preconditions is missing.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a semantically named back_button element if visible and actionable on the page.

issues.message: Home Button referenced in the workflow preconditions is missing.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a semantically named home_button element if visible and actionable on the page.

issues.message: The workflow expects visible login failure feedback, but no invalid login error message element exists in the model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add an invalid_login_message element using a stable visible-text locator once identified.

issues.message: Mandatory-field validation behavior is part of the workflow but no required-field validation element is modeled.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a required_field_message element if visible validation text exists on the page.

approved_elements.name: username_textbox
approved_elements.description: Input field used to enter the username for authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Secure password input field used for authentication.

approved_elements.name: login_button
approved_elements.description: Primary action button used to submit login credentials.
